title: Introducing NoCap Swap
excerpt: When your habit score dips, NoCap Swap steps in — surfacing AI-ranked alternatives so you can upgrade any weak component in one tap.

title: How We Built the Reverse Search Engine
excerpt: Instead of you searching for better habits, NoCap searches for you — continuously and automatically. Here's how the engine works under the hood.

title: Habit Stacks — A New Way to Build Routines
excerpt: Stack habits together into powerful routines with shared goals, budgets, and AI scoring. Built for people who want to change more than one thing at a time.

title: Designing for Accountability Without Guilt
excerpt: A look inside the design principles behind NoCap — how we built an interface that shows you the truth without making you feel bad about it.

title: How One User Cut Grocery Spend by 30% in 60 Days
excerpt: A deep dive into how a NoCap user used HabitLinks and AI Swap suggestions to dramatically reduce their weekly food costs without changing what they eat.

title: AI Habit Scoring: 0 to 100%
excerpt: Every habit in NoCap gets a live AI score. Here's how the model works, what Good vs. Bad vs. Swap means, and how scores update as you track.
